title: Hook and Loop Self Adhesive Sewing Tape 40 Inch 3/4 Wide for Arts Crafts - Black
description:
When you want to fasten something to the wall, you can't always use tacks and nails. A simple solution would be tape, but if you want to take it on and off, tape isn't going to do the job. The solution: self-adhesive hook and loop fastener strips. Be sure to keep these handy strips around the house, office, or garage! They're great for picture frames, remotes, small tools, speakers, surge protectors, and more!

  • Great for Attaching Lightweight Objects
